title: EasyPeasyGaps
description: Cheaper Golden Apples! Using 4 Gold Instead of 8!
body: Cheaper Golden Apples, which use 4 gold ingots instead of 8 (surrounding an apple, as per usual). You should download the project as it is super useful for SMP's as I've seen many SMP's using it, and also it's just convenient!** No dependencies necessary as it is a datapack NOT A MOD!**
